title: Backend Deployment Direction
intro: I'm moving from frontend-only demos toward complete deployment systems: static frontends, API backends, hosted databases, environment variables, auth, storage, monitoring, and safe deployment workflows. My next study target is to deploy a backend API on Azure or AWS and connect it to a static frontend.

tracks.detail: Vercel / Azure Static Web Apps / AWS Amplify or S3 + CloudFront
Azure App Service / Container Apps, or AWS App Runner / ECS / Lambda
Postgres via Neon, Supabase, Azure Database for PostgreSQL, or AWS RDS
Cloudflare R2, Azure Blob Storage, or AWS S3
Env vars, migrations, logs, health checks, rollback, and secret handling

proof: Backend-adjacent proof I already have across these projects: Cloudflare Pages Functions, Express + Prisma APIs, Postgres, Neon, Supabase with row-level security, server actions, atomic transactions, and server-side scoring.
